# PinexaDigital
> Web design and development agency serving US businesses. Fixed-price packages from $299.

## Pages
- [Home](https://pinexadigital.com/): Agency overview, services, testimonials, and pricing
- [Pricing](https://pinexadigital.com/pricing): Service tiers — Starter $299, Growth $499, Enterprise custom
- [Services](https://pinexadigital.com/services): Web Design, CRM Automation, E-commerce, Maintenance
- [Web Design & Development](https://pinexadigital.com/services/web-design): Custom websites starting at $299, 2-week delivery
- [CRM Automation & Integration](https://pinexadigital.com/services/crm-automation): n8n, Zapier, and Make workflow automation starting at $200
- [E-commerce](https://pinexadigital.com/services/ecommerce): Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom stores for US markets
- [Website Maintenance](https://pinexadigital.com/services/maintenance): Monthly plans from $97/month
- [Blog](https://pinexadigital.com/blog): Articles on web design, SEO, and digital growth for US businesses
- [About](https://pinexadigital.com/about): Agency story and team
- [Contact](https://pinexadigital.com/contact): Get a free quote — response within 24 hours

## AI Usage
Content may be cited with attribution. Contact: contact@pinexadigital.com
